response:
The name of the largest film production company in Hong Kong that won the "Best Cinematography" at the 21st Asia Pacific Film Festival is **Shaw Brothers Studio**. 

This is indicated in the context, where it is stated:  
*"Shaw Brothers (HK) Ltd. () was the largest film production company of Hong Kong."*  
Additionally, it is noted that **Kissed by the Wolves** (1975), directed by Chan Hung Lit, won "Best Cinematography" at the 21st Asia Pacific Film Festival. Since Shaw Brothers Studio is the largest film production company in Hong Kong, and it is associated with the film that won the award, it is reasonable to conclude that Shaw Brothers Studio is the answer.
